message:
Add comprehensive AgentCard test cases for all status+compact combinations

Add test cases to cover all branches in AgentCard Render and renderCompact:
- idle agent full (non-compact)
- stale agent compact
- ended agent full (non-compact)
- unknown status compact

Coverage for Render improved from 88.2% to 100%.
Coverage for renderCompact improved from 87.5% to 100%.
Package coverage improved from 97.4% to 98.8%.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
